description: memory-system hooks: SessionStart injects memory at session boot so turn 1 has the index without needing a tool call. PreToolUse re-injects at session-relevant boundaries (subagent return, slug change, mtime bump) and dedups via shared state. PostToolUse confirms delivery so rejected tool calls don't burn the inject. Stop spawns a detached worker that asks Claude to audit the recent turn and persist anything memo-worthy via the memory-system skill.
